title: How to create a custom automation with conditional logic to run a webhook

posts.author: zanda (testdaman man)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have set up an automation using Microsoft Power Automate that triggers every time a new item is created. While it works, the issue is that it activates for every new item, which I don’t want.

I want to create a custom automation that only triggers a webhook when a new item is created and its title is “ABC.”

Does anyone know how to set this up or have any alternative solutions?

Thank you!
